title: Charkhi Dadri Safai Karmchari Vacancy 2026, Notification Out, Apply Now -
how_to_apply: Download the Form: visit the official website Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). Also, attach a self-addressed envelope of size 25 cm x 10 cm. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed as “Application for the post of ___________________”. Send Application Form: Block Development and Panchayat Officer Office, Boand Charkhi Dadri Safai Karmchari Vacancy 2026
jobs_info: Charkhi Dadri Safai Karmchari Vacancy 2026: Applications are invited for the vacant post of Safai Karmchari in Gram Panchayat Baund Kalan. The applicant must be a resident of the same village. If, in any case, a sufficient number of people are not available in a particular village for the cleaning work, then permission will also be given to employ a resident of a nearby village under the scheme. The applicant, whether male or female, must be physically capable and healthy and should be between 18 and 55 years of age. The applicant can submit his/her application on any working day at the Block Development and Panchayat Officer Office, Baund, from 18.05.2026 to 01.06.2026 (office hours: 09:00 AM to 05:00 PM).
